entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation-BundleTask Rule Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE Bundle PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <Bundle created="1723441039308" displayName="AccountingITRoleHTask" id="AccountingITRoleHTask" modified="1723442857747" name="AccountingITRoleHTask" significantModified="1723442857747" type="it"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="accountSelectorRules"/> <entry key="allowDuplicateAccounts" value="false"/> <entry key="allowMultipleAssignments" value="false"/> <entry key="mergeTemplates" value="false"/> <entry key="sysDescriptions"> <value> <Map> <entry key="en_US"/> </Map> </value> </entry> </Map> </Attributes> <Owner> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.Identity" id="spadmin" name="spadmin"/> </Owner> <Profiles> <Profile created="1723442845773" id="c0a81d89912c1c5a81914532d84d186e" modified="1723442857747" significantModified="1723442857747"> <ApplicationRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.Application" id="ADX" name="ActiveDirectory"/> </ApplicationRef> <Constraints> <Filter operation="CONTAINS_ALL" property="memberOf"> <Value> <List> <String>CN=Corporate-VPN,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com</String> </List> </Value> </Filter> </Constraints> </Profile> </Profiles> </Bundle>
